OUR MISSION

Solving the Archipelago Gap

We bridge the logistics divide between Indonesia's 17,000 islands and the global market through our strategic Batam Consolidation Hub.

🛡

Curated & Verified

Every product is vetted for quality, authenticity, and export readiness. We partner only with brands that meet international standards — BPOM, Halal, HACCP.

📦

Smart Consolidation

Our Smart Cart logic allows you to combine products from multiple suppliers into a single shipment from our Batam Hub, saving up to 40% on shipping.

🌍

Global Access

Access rare regional flavors and premium artisan goods previously unavailable in Western markets. Direct from the source, delivered to your door.

CURATED COLLECTION

Premium Indonesian Products

From rare single-origin coffee to authentic traditional spices — every product certified and export-ready.

SIGNATURE COLLECTIONS

Curated Gift Kits

Thoughtfully assembled collections designed for different tastes and occasions. Each kit showcases the best of Origin of Indonesia.

HOW IT WORKS

Curated Excellence from Indonesia

We've spent years building relationships with Indonesia's finest producers. Every brand is hand-selected for quality, authenticity, and export excellence.

01

🛡

Curate

We personally vet every producer for quality, certifications (BPOM, Halal, HACCP), and brand alignment. Only the best make it through.

02

📦

Consolidate

Your order is intelligently consolidated at our Batam Hub, reducing shipping costs and environmental impact while maintaining product integrity.

03

🚚

Deliver

Premium packaging and reliable international fulfillment ensure your products arrive fresh, intact, and ready to enjoy — anywhere in the world.

Batam FTZ
Export Hub

OUR FOUNDER

Ahlul Firdaus

"I grew up watching incredible Indonesian food never make it past our shores — not because the quality wasn't there, but because the logistics were broken. Getting products from Java, Bali, and Sulawesi consolidated for export was either impossible or ruinously expensive. Origin of Indonesia is my answer to that gap."

Based in Batam, Indonesia, Ahlul leverages the Free Trade Zone's unique position to consolidate products from across the archipelago for efficient global export. PT. Ahlul Karya Utama is the legal entity behind Origin of Indonesia.

Premium Quality First

Only certified products meeting international standards

Trust & Transparency

Export businesses live and die on trust

Batam FTZ Advantage

Strategic location for global logistics

B2B SOLUTIONS

B2B Wholesale Solutions

Direct wholesale pricing for importers, retailers, and distributors. Our Batam consolidation hub reduces shipping costs by 40%, consolidates multiple suppliers into single shipments, and ensures quality control at every step.

👥

Flexible MOQs

Minimum order quantities start at 5 units per SKU. Volume discounts: 10% for 5+ orders, 15% for 10+ orders.

🛡

Verified Quality

All products certified: BPOM, Halal, HACCP, Fair Trade, Organic. Full documentation provided. Batch testing available.

📦

Batam Hub

Multiple sellers' products consolidated into single shipments. 40% lower shipping costs. Lead times: 7–14 days. Net 30 available.

FIRST ORDER · NEW BUYER

Trial & Sample

Start here — no commitment needed

  • Sample packs available before bulk commitment
  • Produced to order — guaranteed freshness
  • TT / Wire Transfer accepted
  • Full documentation provided (BPOM, Halal, COO)
  • Shipment within 7–14 business days

100% Prepayment

Strategic Partner

BULK ORDER · STRATEGIC PARTNER

Wholesale Partnership

Minimum order USD $5,000

  • Minimum order value USD $5,000
  • Letter of Credit (LC) welcomed
  • Escrow arrangement available
  • Volume discount — custom pricing per SKU
  • Dedicated account manager assigned
  • Private label & custom packaging on request
  • By application — subject to OOI approval

By Negotiation
